intro:
Unfortunately, I was unable to locate information about the plant Funkiella hyemalis.

However, I can provide general information about the plant Funkia hyemalis (also known as Funkiella hyemalis).

Funkia hyemalis, also known as Funkiella hyemalis, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asparagaceae family. It is a perennial plant native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its health benefits. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Funkia hyemalis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Funkia hyemalis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.

Please note that Funkia hyemalis is the correct species name for this plant.
